result.summary: Found 3 visually noticeable issues: a blank top-right CTA that looks missing, a scrolling prompt overlay that obscures the fine print, and a typo in the scroll label.

issues.description: The top-right rounded button in the header appears completely blank, with no visible label or icon.
issues.suggestion: Confirm whether the CTA text failed to load; if so, restore the label or replace the placeholder with a visible action.

issues.description: The floating "SCROL DOWN" prompt overlaps the lower promotional disclaimer text, making the fine print partially unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt away from the disclaimer area or reduce its size/opacity so it doesn't block important text.

issues.description: The scroll prompt text appears to be misspelled as "SCROL DOWN" instead of "SCROLL DOWN".
issues.suggestion: Correct the label text to "SCROLL DOWN".
